introduction: This experiment focuses on database normalization and functional dependencies. Normalization is a step-by-step process used to reduce redundancy and anomalies in relational schemas.

functionalDependencies.title: Functional Dependencies
functionalDependencies.content: A functional dependency X → Y in a relation R indicates that for each value of X there is exactly one associated value of Y.

anomalies.title: Anomalies
anomalies.content: Unnormalized relations may suffer from insertion, update, and deletion anomalies.
